2606.06416.title: Unsupervised Skill Discovery for Agentic Data Analysis
2606.06416.paper_summary: Inference-time skill augmentation provides a lightweight way to improve data-analytic agents by injecting reusable procedural knowledge without updating model parameters. However, discovering effective skills for data analysis remains challenging, as reliable supervision is expensive and success criteria vary across analytical formats. This raises the key question of how to discover reusable data-analysis skills from unlabeled exploration alone. We propose DataCOPE, an unsupervised verifier-guided skill discovery framework for data-analytic agents. DataCOPE derives verifier signals from the exploration trajectories and uses them to characterize relative quality or aggreement among trajectories. It iteratively coordinates a Data-Analytic Agent for trajectory generation, an Unsupervised Verifier for signal extraction, and a Skill Manager for contrastive skill distillation. For report-style analysis, we instantiate the verifier as an Adaptive Checklist Verifier that derives task-specific criteria, scores reports by verifiable coverage, and iteratively refines the checklist. For reasoning-style analysis, we instantiate it as an Answer Agreement Verifier that groups trajectories by answer agreement and uses self-consistency as an auxiliary signal. We evaluate DataCOPE on report-style analysis from Deep Data Research and reasoning-style analysis from DABStep. Across both settings, DataCOPE consistently improves held-out performance over baselines. Averaged across four model settings, DataCOPE improves the mean score by 9.71% and 32.30% on report-style and reasoning-style tasks respectively.
2606.06416.paper_summary_zh: 推理時的技能增強提供了一種輕量級的方法來改善數據分析代理，通過注入可重用的程序知識而不更新模型參數。<lb/>然而，發現有效的數據分析技能仍然具有挑戰性，因為可靠的監督是昂貴的，且成功標準在不同的分析格式中各不相同。<lb/>這引出了如何僅通過無標籤探索來發現可重用數據分析技能的關鍵問題。<lb/>我們提出了DataCOPE，一種無監督的驗證者引導技能發現框架，專為數據分析代理設計。<lb/>DataCOPE從探索軌跡中提取驗證者信號，並利用這些信號來表徵軌跡之間的相對質量或一致性。<lb/>它迭代協調一個數據分析代理以生成軌跡、一個無監督的驗證者以提取信號，以及一個技能管理器以進行對比技能提煉。<lb/>對於報告風格的分析，我們將驗證者具體化為自適應檢查清單驗證者，該驗證者得出特定任務的標準，通過可驗證的覆蓋率為報告打分，並迭代地完善檢查清單。<lb/>對於推理風格的分析，我們將其具體化為答案一致性驗證者，該驗證者根據答案一致性對軌跡進行分組，並使用自我一致性作為輔助信號。<lb/>我們在Deep Data Research的報告風格分析和DABStep的推理風格分析中評估了DataCOPE。<lb/>在這兩種設置中，DataCOPE始終在持有的性能上超越基準。<lb/>在四個模型設置的平均下，DataCOPE在報告風格和推理風格任務上分別提高了9.71%和32.30%的平均分數。
2606.06416.author: Zhisong Qiu et.al.
2606.06416.authors: Zhisong Qiu, Kangqi Song, Shengwei Tang, Shuofei Qiao, Lei Liang, Huajun Chen, Shumin Deng
